description_long: This is a rounded, ancient-style vase with a narrow neck and a wide, bulbous body, topped by a flat, decorated lid. The surface is adorned with intricate, high-relief carvings depicting a procession of human figures and possibly animals, suggesting a narrative or ceremonial scene. The carvings wrap around the entire body, with the figures rendered in a classical style reminiscent of Greco-Roman or Etruscan art. The vase appears to be made of a dark, weathered ceramic or stone, with lighter highlights accentuating the raised details. The lid features additional sculptural elements, possibly mythological or symbolic in nature. The overall appearance is that of a historical or decorative artifact, likely intended for display in a prominent urban or public setting.
description: A dark, rounded vase with a narrow neck, ornate lid, and detailed high-relief carvings of human figures encircling its body. The surface is richly textured and appears aged, evoking a classical or ancient ceremonial style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vase's ornate lid and the most prominent section of the carved procession, with figures clearly visible in high relief.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the curvature of the vase and the continuation of the carved narrative, with figures partially turned away.
description_view_2: The back view displays another segment of the carved scene, with the figures and decorative motifs wrapping around the body.
description_view_3: This angle reveals the opposite side of the vase, showing the end of the procession and the detailed surface texture.
attribute_pattern: narrative procession of human figures in relief
